world_name: Legend of the Five Rings - Rokugan
prompt:
Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: project-bound RPG world atlas map, portrait orientation
Primary request: Legend of the Five Rings / Rokugan inspired Japanese feudal fantasy atlas for the terrain type dual_continent.
Scene/backdrop: two major samurai-empire landmasses separated by uneven misty seas and narrow straits, with clan provinces, celestial mountain ranges, castle districts, sacred forest groves, elemental spirit realms, shrine roads, rice plains, cherry blossom valleys, courtly capitals and Shadowlands-tainted borderlands.
Style/medium: high-resolution illustrated Rokugan-style atlas, Japanese feudal fantasy, parchment and ink wash cartography, elemental rings aesthetic, mon crest ornaments, cherry blossom atmosphere, honor and duty.
Composition/framing: tall portrait map, asymmetric continents of different sizes; the misty sea separation is diagonal and S-shaped with C-shaped gulfs, L-shaped channels and jagged straits, not a simple vertical divider; include compass seal, elegant border, province boundary shading, castle icons, shrine symbols, clan crest-like ornaments and mountain pass marks without readable text.
Geography constraints: realistic complex coastlines with peninsulas, bays, gulfs, capes, broken shores, curved coasts, deltas, misty estuaries, inland seas and varied landforms; span snowy sacred peaks, temperate forests, rice plains, deserts, wetlands, volcanic lands, sacred groves, spirit valleys and corrupted Shadowlands.
Avoid: western medieval fantasy, modern satellite image, mirrored continents, bright UI, readable labels, watermark, logo, real-world map copy.
